description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Builds that runs on push to master and github_actions branches and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy to build the Godot editor with 32-bit and 64-bit floats. Checkout the Godot repository and a module under the correct directory, configure dependencies, load and upload a scons cache, set up Python 3.x, install scons, and compile the editor with specific flags. Upload the resulting build as an artifact.
